Sec. 1  
In 2019, the Chief Minister of Andhra Pradesh was Y. S. Jagan Mohan Reddy. He was the leader of the YSR Congress Party. He served as the Chief Minister from 2019 to 2024.  

***  
Y. S. Jagan Mohan Reddy was born on September 12, 1970. He was the son of Y. S. Rajasekhara Reddy. He was the former Chief Minister of Andhra Pradesh.  

***  
Y. S. Jagan Mohan Reddy was elected as the Chief Minister in 2019. He won the election with a strong majority. He was re-elected in 2024.  

***  
Y. S. Jagan Mohan Reddy was the leader of the YSR Congress Party. He was the son of Y. S. Rajasekhara Reddy. He was the Chief Minister of Andhra Pradesh.  

***  
Y. S. Jagan Mohan Reddy was the first Chief Minister of the new state of Andhra Pradesh. He was the leader of the YSR Congress Party. He was the son of Y. S. Rajasekhara Reddy.
